criteria.description: Orientation block written to Claude Code CLAUDE.md on init
criteria.notes: ClaudeCodeWriter.write() injects SECTION_OPEN/SECTION_CLOSE block; idempotent on re-run

criteria.description: Orientation block idempotent — no duplicates on repeated writes
criteria.notes: MarkdownRulesWriter replaces existing section rather than appending

criteria.description: session-start CLI command exits 0 always, including outside a project
criteria.notes: session_start() wrapped in broad except; _find_project_root returns None when no .kittify found

criteria.description: session-start is silent when not inside a spec-kitty project
criteria.notes: _find_project_root() returns None → no content written to stdout

criteria.description: session-start prints orientation block when inside a project
criteria.notes: SessionPresenceManager.install() called; content printed to stdout

criteria.description: UpgradeChecker returns None (not raises) when no cache exists
criteria.notes: get_available_version() returns None on missing or malformed cache file

criteria.description: spec-kitty init wires session presence for configured harnesses
criteria.notes: SessionPresenceManager.install() called from init.py after save_agent_config

criteria.description: Orientation block includes version, project slug, health state
criteria.notes: SessionPresenceContent.render() covers all three health states

criteria.description: SessionStart hook registered in .claude/settings.json on init
criteria.notes: ClaudeCodeHookRegistrar writes SessionStart hook entry to settings.json

criteria.description: Phase 2 writers cover all pattern B harnesses (cursor, windsurf, copilot, roo, kiro, gemini)
criteria.notes: All 17 harness keys registered; Pattern B uses MarkdownRulesWriter with check_dir
AgentsMdWriter writes to AGENTS.md; can_write always True

criteria.description: Skills preamble (pi, vibe, letta, codex) written via SkillsPreambleWriter (Pattern D)
criteria.notes: SkillsPreambleWriter extends AgentsMdWriter; registered for pi, vibe, letta, codex

criteria.description: spec-kitty upgrade migration applies session presence to existing projects
criteria.notes: Phase 1 (Claude Code) and Phase 2 (all harnesses) migrations tested end-to-end

criteria.description: Migration detect() returns False when presence already written (idempotent)
criteria.notes: detect() checks has_presence() for all configured harnesses

criteria.description: Phase 2 migration runs as part of spec-kitty upgrade
criteria.notes: MigrationRunner discovers both m_3_3_0 migrations via registry

criteria.description: Migration dry_run reports changes without writing files
criteria.notes: apply(dry_run=True) returns changes list without mutating disk

criteria.description: New harness writers auto-detected by Phase 2 migration without code changes
criteria.notes: C2 test: monkey-patches WRITER_REGISTRY[qwen] with real MarkdownRulesWriter, detect() returns True
